====Pokémon====
{{MissingInfo|1|java|scope=section}}
This listing is of Prima (Lorelei)'s Pokémon in {{aniseries|PTS}}:
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Prima
|pkmn=Slowbro
|type1=Water
|type2=Psychic
|img=Lorelei Slowbro.png
|epnum=EP099
|epname=The Mandarin Island Miss Match
|vajp=
|vaen=Eric Stuart
|desc=Prima first used her {{p|Slowbro}} to calm down {{Ash}}'s rampaging {{AP|Charizard}} with its Disable, which allowed Ash to recall it.

Prima also used Slowbro during her lecture. It was easily able to take out a {{pkmn|Trainer}}'s {{p|Machamp}} with a Mega Punch.

Slowbro's known moves are {{m|Disable}} and {{m|Mega Punch}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Prima
|pkmn=Dewgong
|type1=Water
|type2=Ice
|img=Lorelei Dewgong.png
|epnum=EP099
|epname=The Mandarin Island Miss Match
|vajp=
|vaen=Michael Haigney
|desc=Not much is known about Prima's {{p|Dewgong}}, as it has only been seen briefly during Prima's lecture, where it defeated a {{pkmn|Trainer}}'s {{p|Marowak}}.

Dewgong's only known move is {{m|Aurora Beam}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Prima
|pkmn=Cloyster
|type1=Water
|type2=Ice
|img=Lorelei Cloyster.png
|epnum=EP099
|epname=The Mandarin Island Miss Match
|vajp=Katsuyuki Konishi
|vaen=Michael Haigney
|main=Lorelei's Cloyster
|desc={{p|Cloyster}} is Prima's main Pokémon. She first used it during her lecture, where it was easily able to {{status|freeze}} a {{pkmn|Trainer}}'s {{p|Kadabra}} with a strong {{m|Blizzard}}. She also later used Cloyster in her {{pkmn|battle}} against [[Ash's Pikachu]]. While Pikachu managed to damage Cloyster with {{m|Thunder}}, Cloyster was easily able to defeat him with an {{m|Aurora Beam}}-{{m|Take Down}} combo.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Prima
|pkmn=Jynx
|gender=female
|type1=Ice
|type2=Psychic
|img=Lorelei Jynx.png
|epnum=EP099
|epname=The Mandarin Island Miss Match
|vajp=
|vaen=Rachael Lillis
|desc=Prima used her {{p|Jynx}} when {{TRT}} arrived at home to steal {{AP|Pikachu}}. Jynx first {{status|freeze|froze}} Team Rocket with an Ice Punch{{tt|*|Incorrectly referred as Ice Beam in the dub}} and then sent them [[blasting off]] by using Blizzard.

Jynx's known moves are {{m|Ice Punch}} and {{m|Blizzard}}.}}
